summary: Tested Bulk Operations (bulk-status, bulk-delete) and Multi-Checkbox Filters for MIS Dashboard. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified bulk action bar, row selection, status dropdown, and multi-checkbox filters working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-status - Admin can update status for multiple loans
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-status - Manager can update status
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-status - Agent can call endpoint (no role restriction)
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-status - Empty ids returns 400
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-status - Missing status returns 400
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-status - Status update persists in database
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-delete - Admin can bulk delete loans
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-delete - Agent gets 403 (correctly denied)
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-delete - Manager gets 403 (admin only)
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-delete - Empty ids returns 400
Backend: POST /api/loans/bulk-delete - Deleted loans verified as removed
Backend: GET /api/master/categories - Returns 6 categories for filter
Backend: GET /api/master/products - Returns 6 products for filter
Backend: GET /api/master/banks - Returns 97+ banks for filter
Backend: GET /api/statuses - Returns all statuses for bulk update dropdown
UI: MIS table rows have checkboxes for selection
UI: MIS table header has Select All checkbox
UI: Selecting rows shows bulk action bar with count
UI: Bulk action bar shows 'Update Status' dropdown button
UI: Bulk action bar shows 'Delete' button (admin only)
UI: Bulk action bar shows 'Deselect' button
UI: Update Status dropdown shows all statuses (Pending, Login, Approved, Post PD Docs, Sanctioned, Disbursed, Query)
UI: Category filter is multi-checkbox dropdown (not single-select)
UI: Product filter is multi-checkbox dropdown
UI: Bank filter is multi-checkbox dropdown
UI: Clear all button removes all filter selections

bulk_delete.access: Admin only (403 for manager and agent)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Operations and Multi-Checkbox Filters fully tested and working. Bulk-status endpoint allows all users to update status. Bulk-delete is admin-only (403 for others). Multi-checkbox filters use MultiCheckFilter component with popover dropdowns. Filter state uses arrays (filterCategories, filterProducts, filterBanks). Bulk action bar appears when selectedIds.size > 0. All data-testid attributes working correctly for testing.
